calendar.title: 🔴 Mike x Fardad — Salehe Proposal Review

FRNK internal kickoff — get on calendar (Tue May 20 or Wed May 21)

watching.text: Salehe — Fardad pitches Tuesday. Proposal must be sharp. Review together Monday 10:30am.
Victoria starts Tuesday — access must be 100% ready Monday. Onboarding doc doesn't exist yet.
LiveGood — sentiment tenuous. Nothing to Ben until after Travis call. Survey + best sellers ready.
RVCA — price drop Monday, SMS flip pending, Memorial Day briefs needed this week.
Riversol — win-back 3-lane built and ready to flip. 30-day report for Arno/James due this week.
Hiba — June 5 report deadline closing in. ITC meeting not locked. Split test not set up.
Liverpool — ending after May. Offboarding decision still open.
Epicure — SOW sent Sunday. Waiting on Geoff.
FRNK — CLOSED ✅ Kickoff Thu May 22. Internal kickoff Tue/Wed needs scheduling.
